archetype: Automated Geophysical Survey Data Management and Interpretation System for Seismic Exploration in Arctic Regions
description: This system is used by geophysicists and seismic interpreters to manage, process, and interpret large datasets of seismic survey data collected in Arctic regions. The system must account for the unique challenges of Arctic exploration, including extreme weather conditions, remote data collection, and the need for real-time data processing. The system's complexity lies in its ability to handle large datasets, integrate with various seismic acquisition systems, and provide accurate interpretations of the data.
rules: MUST conform to the SEG-Y format for seismic data storage and exchange
MUST integrate with various seismic acquisition systems, such as nodal and cable-based systems
MUST account for the effects of ice and weather conditions on seismic data quality
MUST provide real-time data processing and visualization capabilities
MUST ensure data security and compliance with regulatory requirements for Arctic exploration
anti_patterns: DO NOT assume a traditional, land-based seismic exploration workflow, as Arctic operations require unique considerations
DO NOT neglect to account for the effects of ice and weather conditions on seismic data quality
DO NOT use a generic data management system, as seismic data requires specialized processing and interpretation
key_technical_challenges: Handling large datasets and high-performance computing requirements
Integrating with various seismic acquisition systems and data formats
Providing accurate interpretations of seismic data in real-time

recommended_stack.language: Python + extensive libraries for scientific computing and data analysis
recommended_stack.framework: Django + scalable and secure architecture for data management
recommended_stack.database_engine: PostgreSQL + support for large datasets and spatial data
recommended_stack.cache: Redis + high-performance caching for real-time data processing
recommended_stack.message_broker: RabbitMQ + scalable messaging for data integration and processing
